# P.O. Receiving Import

Viewpoint has created a custom Purchase Order (PO)
 Receiving Import program that automates the process of receiving the PO line items and
 creating the necessary Accounts Payable invoice associated with each purchase order using
 Spectrum One-Step PO Receiving.
Important: The Purchase Order Receiving Import is a batch
 file upload that is part of the Data Exchange module, which must be licensed in order to
 access this menu option.
[View the PO Receiving Import manual](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/fc3da0f0-8ea8-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7iPmZkumofZlGrB8IExzo5dti2I9qPSDLKhQfMn_nMI&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22PO_Receiving_Import_Manual_v1422.pdf%22)
